nasb.text: Perhaps the Lord will look on my affliction and return good to me instead of his cursing this day.”

esv.text: It may be that the Lord will look on the wrong done to me, and that the Lord will repay me with good for his cursing today.”

cnv.text: 也許耶和華看見我的苦難，就施恩與我，以取代今天這人對我的咒罵。”

ccb.text: 也许耶和华会体察我的困苦，因我今天所受的咒骂而赐福给我。”
